brand.name: AMUUN
brand.tagline: Private expeditions across the world's last wild horizon.

tour.ctaBody: Private expeditions are limited to six guests per departure.

gobi.headline: Cross the Infinite
gobi.body: Drive ancient herder trails across the Gobi's silent expanse. Every dune line looks like a calligraphy stroke.

taiga.headline: Meet the Reindeer People
taiga.body: Spend time with the Tsaatan, one of the last nomadic groups living among wild reindeer in the Siberian-edge forest.

dunes.headline: Climb the Singing Dunes
dunes.body: Ascend 300-meter dunes that hum in the wind, then ride camels at sunset along a ribbon of orange and violet.

canyon.headline: Descend into the Canyon
canyon.body: Hike through the 'Mongolian Grand Canyon', a labyrinth of red cliffs, fossil beds, and silence so deep you can hear the earth cool.

altai.headline: Trek the Five Holy Peaks
altai.body: Climb Mongolia's highest summits, walk on ancient glaciers, and meet Kazakh eagle hunters in the high pastures.

volcano.headline: Camp by the White Lake
volcano.body: Paddle crystal water inside an extinct volcano, then sleep under stars that feel close enough to touch.

karakorum.headline: Walk the Ancient Capital
karakorum.body: Stand where Genghis Khan built his power base. Visit Erdene Zuu, stone turtles, and the ruins that changed history.

toursListing.title: Expeditions
toursListing.subtitle: Seven private journeys across Mongolia's last wild horizons.
toursListing.metaDescription: Private 4×4 and trekking expeditions across the Gobi, Altai, Taiga, and Orkhon.

contact.intro: Tell us what you're drawn to. Desert, mountains, culture, or all of it. We'll design a private expedition that matches your pace.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your dream journey...

destinations.metaDescription: Five regions across Mongolia — Central, Gobi, Western, Northern, and Terelj. Choose where your journey runs.

hero.heading: Five regions, one country
hero.intro: Mongolia is not a single landscape. From the gravel plains of the Gobi to the glaciated peaks of the Altai, from the taiga forests of Khuvsgul to the granite valleys of Terelj — every region carries its own weather, its own people, its own pace. Choose where your journey runs.

northern.label: Northern
northern.tagline: Taiga, reindeer, and a dark blue lake

terelj.label: Terelj
terelj.tagline: Granite cliffs an hour from the capital

detail.noTours: No tours currently routed through here.

cta.heading: Compose a journey across regions
cta.body: Mix any of the five into a single private itinerary. Tell us where you want to begin.
